description: A radiologist needs a Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP) image to visualize vascular calcifications and subtle fracture lines from the CT Cranium DICOM scan loaded in InVesalius 3. Export the Axial view in 'MaxIP' (Maximum Intensity Projection) mode with a slab thickness of at least 15 slices as a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/axial_mip.png. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
